programme.title: Demos and Dishes
programme.desc: It’s the start of a search for the newest face of ATK. For the Task, 11 cooks are thrown into a media challenge. Then in the Test challenge, they must prepare a dish that made them fall in love with cooking. One cook will be sent home. Season 1 Winner, Antoinette Johnson, joins Dan Souza, Jack Bishop, Julia Collin Davison and Elle Simone Scott for the start of a fiercely battled competition.

programme.title: Great Egg-Spectations
programme.desc: It’s only week two in the test kitchen and the competition is fire! Head Judge Dan Souza is back with Cook’s Country’s Morgan Bolling and Jeannie Mae hosts. The Task examines the cooks' egg techniques. It’s no yolk! Then, the Test challenges the cooks to make comfort food with a twist! Baker and television personality, Bryan Ford, joins the kitchen as the guest judge.

programme.title: A Perfect Blend of Cooks
programme.desc: It’s health week in the kitchen. First, the remaining nine cooks must create a 90-second solo demo with a blender and a mystery ingredient. Then in the Test challenge, the cooks must pick from one of ATK’s cookbooks and create a dish that could seamlessly fit in. Chef and model, Ronnie Woo guest judges.

programme.title: Too Many Cooks in the Kitchen
programme.desc: This week, the 8 remaining cooks must team up in pairs to tackle a media challenge showcasing simple how-tos. Then in the Test challenge, they team up again to create a meal fit for a modern dinner party. Guest Judge, Melissa King, along with Dan Souza and Jack Bishop, will decide which team is on top, and which cook from the bottom team will be leaving the Test Kitchen for good.

programme.title: Un-Boxing Day
programme.desc: This week, the Task challenge has the cooks faced with mystery ingredients picked by ATK's beloved cast. Cooks Country star Bryan Roof stops by to offer his favorite ingredients and help judge the cooks' dishes. In the Test, the legendary Pati Jinich presents our cooks with the unique challenge of creating a dish with only four ingredients!

programme.title: Parties and Holiday Feasts
programme.desc: It’s a party this week at America’s Test Kitchen! The 6 remaining cooks compete in challenges revolving around party food. The Task dares them to make an appetizer version of popular ATK main courses. Then Jeannie recruits the cooks’ own family members to bring the holidays to the Test Kitchen. Chef Joe Sasto joins judges Dan Souza and Julia Collin Davison in an emotional and celebratory episode.

programme.title: It’s an Abbondanza!
programme.desc: After a surprising test with no elimination, 6 cooks still remain. This week, the Task is to create, style and photograph a gift basket with a unique flavor profile. The winner gets a secret advantage! Next, we're going around the world in the Test with three-dish cuisine-themed food towers. Comedian Punkie Johnson guests.

programme.title: I’m on a Boat!
programme.desc: We’re down to the Final Five and the competition is fierce. This time, the cooks are going on a field trip! After spending a wonderful morning at Island Creek, the cooks must prepare two cooked oyster dishes in the Task Challenge. For the Test Challenge, the cooks are asked to impress guest judge Vivian Tu with their use of expensive ingredients and fine dining cuisine skills.

programme.title: Burn Pile Murder Trial
programme.desc: According to prosecutors in their opening statements, money was the motive for this murder. Next, Melody Farris' defense delivered their opening remarks to the jury. They claimed police acted on confirmation bias when they allegedly narrowed erroneously on the defendant for the death of her husband, Gary. A complicated family coupled with a complicated police investigation all led to fingers pointing at Melody Farris for first-degree murder.

programme.title: MeatEater - Ribeye of the Sky: Sandhill Cranes in West Texas
programme.desc: Steve and bird hunting aficionado Ronny Boehme join up with wildlife biologist Ed Arnett in Lubbock, Texas.

programme.title: MeatEater - The Coldest Hunt: Nunivak Island Muskox
programme.desc: Lightning strikes twice: Steven Rinella has somehow beaten the odds and drawn a second Muskox tag after having to forfeit his first one four years ago due to unforeseen circumstances. Steve has always regretted passing up an opportunity to hunt Muskox but with another tag in his pocket, nothing will stop this adventure. We learn about the native history and culture of Nunivak Island's as Steve tries to stay warm while chasing Muskox 30 miles offshore in the Bering Sea.

programme.title: MeatEater - Gobbling: California Turkeys
programme.desc: The last time Joe Rogan and Bryan Callen went out with Steven Rinella they were soaked head to toe and came home meatless. To remedy their meat crisis while keeping them dry, Steve sets up a springtime wild turkey hunt in sunny California. Steve gives Joe and Bryan the A to Z on hunting, butchering, and cooking the wild turkey. Steve caps off the introductory lesson by preparing his favorite turkey recipe: Schnitzel.

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 1
programme.desc: In the first part of this series, Steve attempts a unique spring hunt for sooty grouse in the coastal rainforests of southeast Alaska. These mysterious hooters make for a hunt that is markedly different from any other and success doesn't come easily. They say blind squirrels can find a nut, but will Steve harvest a grouse?

programme.title: MeatEater - Unconventional: Alaska Sooty Grouse Part 2
programme.desc: In Part One, Steve experienced the difficulty of hunting the Sooty grouse of southeast Alaska.

programme.title: MeatEater - Wild to Table: Memorable Meals Cooking Special
programme.desc: Steve loves to fish as much as he loves to hunt.Steve is on a river in SW Montana for a day to catch.

programme.title: MeatEater - Up at the Cabin: Prince of Wales Island Black Bear
programme.desc: Last spring, Steve decided to pass up an opportunity to kill a black bear in favor of an extended up close and personal experience. This time, Steve heads back to his shack on Prince of Wales Island and he's brought his friend Paul Neess from Vortex Optics along to share the experience of using a canoe to slip in close to these giant black bears.

programme.title: MeatEater - Southern Traditions: Virginia Doves
programme.desc: All across America hunters kick off the fall hunting season with a weekend of doves, friends, and food. Steve's lifelong friend, Ronny Boehme has invited Steve out to his digs in Virginia for the dove opener. To prep for opening day, Steve and Ron spend a day brushing up on their shooting skills on a sporting clays course followed by a pigeon hunt. Steve shares simple, delicious cooking methods for doves and pigeons.

programme.title: MeatEater - Mountain Meditation: BC Grizzly Bear
programme.desc: Ryan Callaghan and Aaron Evans join Steve on an epic adventure in British Columbia's Rockies to pursue grizzly bears. Steve has long desired to take a grizzly but only if he can do it in a way that fits his personal ethics. The hunt is dampened by frustrating weather but Steve finds a way to fix a tasty meal.

programme.title: MeatEater - Lobster of the Prairie: Wyoming Antelope
programme.desc: Steve is fed up with disrespect for one of the world's most unique game animals-the pronghorn antelope.

programme.title: MeatEater - Land of the Giants: Idaho Mule Deer Part 1
programme.desc: Steve's quest for a giant mule deer buck continues in central Idaho.

programme.title: MeatEater - Land of the Giants: Idaho Mule Deer Part 2
programme.desc: Steve's quest for a giant mule deer buck continues in central Idaho. To help Steve in his journey, Ryan Callaghan has offered up one of his best spots as well as his keen spotting skills. The duo backpack hunt in some of the West's steepest and prettiest mountains seeking the colossal buck of Steve's dreams. In part two Steve finds the buck he's been searching for his whole life. The dream is realized and Steve and Ryan feast on a slow cooked roast.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Butchering a Whole Deer
programme.desc: In this Cooking Special, Steve demonstrates how to butcher a whole whitetail deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Duren Deer Camp: Wisconsin Whitetail With Helen and Brittany Part 1
programme.desc: Helen Cho and Brittany Brothers are back for a double episode. This time around they're hunting whitetail deer in Wisconsin on the famed Duren farm with Doug Duren and Steve as their guides. Arriving a few days early to scout and tune up their shooting with some squirrel hunting, the ladies enter the next chapter of their hunting journey.

programme.title: MeatEater - Duren Deer Camp: Wisconsin Whitetail With Helen and Brittany Part 2
programme.desc: Helen Cho and Brittany Brothers are back for a double episode.

programme.title: MeatEater - Steve Makes the Team: Kentucky Small Game
programme.desc: Kevin Murphy and his band of Kentucky small game hunters introduce Steve to the finest Kentucky has to offer. Gray squirrels with tree hounds and cottontails with beagles, in Kentucky, it's the dogs that do the hunting. Cathead biscuits, sawmill gravy, and fried small game round out the Kentucky adventure.

programme.title: MeatEater - A Trip of Firsts: Mexico Coues Deer
programme.desc: Steve and Janis head into the remote mountains of Sonora, Mexico, to pursue the elusive Coues deer.

programme.title: MeatEater - Trapped in History: Wyoming Beaver
programme.desc: Steven Rinella heads to the historic beaver trapping grounds of Wyoming to explore the legacy of the mountain man era. As he sets traps along the Green River, Steve immerses himself in the methods and stories of early American trappers. Alongside his quest to catch beavers, he delves into the fascinating history of how beavers shaped the fur trade and American frontier life. It's a journey through both the rugged landscapes and the rich heritage of the American West.

programme.title: MeatEater - Conservation History, New Mexico Turkey
programme.desc: Steven Rinella and ecologist Karl Malcolm head to the Cibola National Forest, guided by a century-old tip from conservationist Aldo Leopold, to hunt Merriam's wild turkeys. Their adventure showcases the forest's rich history and the legacy of Leopold's conservation efforts while they track these elusive birds through challenging terrain.

programme.title: MeatEater - Cooking Special: Smoked Meats With Eduardo Garcia
programme.desc: Steven Rinella learns new culinary tricks from Chef Eduardo Garcia, a wild game enthusiast from Charged Film & Montana Mex. As Eduardo shares his expertise in smoking meats and preparing wild game dishes, Steve takes notes, eager to expand his culinary repertoire and bring fresh flavors to his own wild game cooking adventures.

programme.title: Evil Twins
programme.desc: There's something oddly fascinating about twins. Maybe it's the secret languages they create, their identical facade, or the rumors about how one can feel when the other is hurt. But when one twin turns bad, does the other stay pure of heart? Channeling sibling rivalries and deadly childhood pacts, Evil Twins follows true-crime mysteries surrounding real-life cases of these evil archetypes. Each episode reveals shocking stories of twins on the edge, from those who sleep with their twin's husband and set them up for murder to those who steal their identities and even come back from the dead.

programme.title: Acapulco en la azotea
programme.desc: Don Hipólito recibe un filtro de agua, pero Germán termina arruinando la instalación. Además, Magdalena se va de vacaciones, pero su destino no es tan lujoso como dice.

programme.title: Cena en París
programme.desc: Hipólito se reencuentra con un viejo amor y deciden cumplir la promesa que se hicieron hace muchos años. Frankie le cuenta sus historias de vida al Calaco.

programme.title: La peli de Frankie
programme.desc: Frankie searches among his neighbors for inspiration for the characters in his new movie. Additionally, Roco and Alejandra find out that Morris won a scholarship.

programme.title: La jubilación de Arturo y Chabelo
programme.desc: Arturo le cuenta a su familia que por fin podrá jubilarse y tendrán un dinero extra. Mientras tanto, los demás vecinos se reúnen para ver En familia con Chabelo.

programme.title: La estética de Lorena
programme.desc: Lorena tiene dificultades económicas y por eso decide abrir una estética que termina arruinando el cabello de sus clientes.

programme.title: Diva en el edificio
programme.desc: Los vecinos compiten en una trivia de televisión para que Lucía Méndez pase una tarde con ellos. Además, Silvia y Luis descubren que posiblemente esperen otro hijo.

programme.title: El sueño de Rocko
programme.desc: Rocko sueña con tener un grupo de rock llamado Los Moridos y empieza reunir a otros integrantes. Mientras, Jorjais decide mejorar su carrito para incrementar sus propinas.

programme.title: Basura en la escalera
programme.desc: Uno de los vecinos deja su basura en las escaleras, por lo que Luisito quiere encontrar al culpable. Además, Silvia hace de todo para ayudar a su sobrina a buscar empleo.

programme.title: La reina del Pik Pok
programme.desc: Erika Buenfil acude a la colonia para encontrar a nuevos talentos, pero termina conociendo a los vecinos. Además, don Hipólito tiene un nuevo trabajo para Germán.

programme.title: Cumpleaños de Luisito Junior
programme.desc: Es el cumpleaños de Luisito Jr. y Silvia se dispone a realizar una fiesta en privado. Sin embargo, los vecinos descubren el festejo y arman una celebración en grande.

programme.title: Bonita familia
programme.desc: Pedro pierde a Rambo en el póker con El Pechugo y Cris intenta recuperarlo. La familia Rivers recibe una mala noticia que tiene que ver con Don Lorenzo.

programme.title: Elote el guajolote
programme.desc: Vanesa recibe la visita de un inspector de seguridad en su clínica para cerciorarse de que todo esté en orden. Además, los vecinos aconsejan a Germán para conquistar a Virginia.

programme.title: Nos cayeron los chahuiztles
programme.desc: Casimiro Pérez, el hermano de Magda llega de visita. Además, la madrastra de Lorena le trae una noticia que cambiará su situación económica.

programme.title: Adopción
programme.desc: Cris shows Pedro the adoption application but they will receive a visit from the social worker. Germán, on the other hand, will be pruning the trees outside the building, without imagining the problems that this would bring.

programme.title: Buzón de quejas
programme.desc: Los problemas en el edificio revivieron un buzón de quejas que ya estaba olvidado, pero este buzón traerá problemas a Luis y Silvia. Por otro lado Morris esta a punto de reprobar el año.

programme.title: Can guash
programme.desc: Pedro se aterra por la llegada de su suegro pues tiene miedo de que no se lleven bien, además Germán y Vanessa emprenden un nuevo negocio.

programme.title: Oficinas de gobierno
programme.desc: Los vecinos aprovechan la apertura de unas nuevas oficinas de gobierno para emprender sus negocios y obtener algo de dinero, pero cuando Luis los descubre, intentará correrlos de la entrada del edificio.

programme.title: Llegada de Martina
programme.desc: Cris y Pablo están esperando a su hija Martina y, nerviosos por conocerla, preparan todo para recibirla. Por otro lado, Liz y Vanesa abren su tienda de ropa virtual y logran hacer un trato con Don Arturo.

programme.title: El gorrión de la canción
programme.desc: Dulce arrives at the building looking for the author of some songs to compose a new single for her. Also, Luis and Silvia meet the parents of one of their son's classmates.

programme.title: Alejandra godín
programme.desc: Arturo llega con la noticia de que Alejandra será una nueva empleada en la empresa donde trabaja. Por otro lado, una pequeña apuesta entre Germán y Birote crece sin control.

programme.title: Sortilegio
programme.desc: Alejandro returns home after a terrible accident to discover that he is married to Maria Jose, a poor, innocent girl who was deceived by Alejandro's brother Bruno. Bruno used Alejandro's name to marry Maria Jose, soon after he sent to kill his brother in hopes that Maria Jose would inherit Alejandro's fortune. But when Maria Jose arrives at the mansion she realizes that Bruno lied to her and used her. She is also scared when Alejandro is found alive and returns home. Doctors tell Alejandro that he suffers from memory loss but he is convinced he never met Maria Jose before and goes in search of the truth, but during this time and Maria Jose actually fall in love, while Bruno and Maura (Alejandro's ex-girlfriend) plot to break them up. Meanwhile, the brothers' mother Victoria has fallen in love with Fernando--Alejandro's best friend, so closer to his age than hers.

programme.desc: A man behind the wheel of a stolen vehicle leads deputies on a wild pursuit. When a man threatens his brother with a knife, Mom calls the cops.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A handcuffed teen makes a run for it when deputies turn him over to paramedics. During a traffic stop, a suspect does his best to keep his lips sealed. An angry aunt unsuccessfully evicts her nephew and his pregnant girlfriend.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man tries to throw the cops off his scent by running through a shower. Deputies are called when a belligerent man violates a restraining order. A husband and wife give the police conflicting stories during a traffic stop.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Officers chase a pair of car thieves through town and into the bushes. A friendship crumbles quickly when the cops begin to ask questions. A deputy stops a man who insists that he lets homeless people use his car for storage.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A sleeping motorist greets deputies with a foul mood. The cops respond to reports of a suspicious person, only to uncover much more. A young woman tries to promise her way out of a trip to jail.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: One suspect takes his chances in a ravine after he leads deputies to a dead end. A quick vehicle search turns a family outing into a trip to the slammer. The cops inspect a domestic disturbance between a dad and his teenage son.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: The temptation of being on camera proves to be too much for one car thief. In order to catch an oblivious driver's attention, officers are forced to disable his car. A woman tries to evade arrest by giving deputies a fake name.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A reckless driver tries to bail out of a checkpoint but outmaneuvers himself instead. Fingers are pointed fast when cops interview a peculiar group of people. Deputies have to do a little digging to get to the bottom of things.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A suspected copper thief plays dumb when the cops catch up to him. A jittery cyclist tries to get away with a slippery maneuver. A couple takes their bout of domestic violence to the streets.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: ATV joyriders lead officers on an unwieldy chase. An attempt to check on some expired tags ends with a young couple at gunpoint. A motorist gives deputies his brother's name in hopes of avoiding jail time.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A young couple attempts to give the cops the slip during a storm. A motorist tries to resist deputies, but his moves are as outdated as his accessories. Police encounter a suspiciously sweaty man on an eerily dim street.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: An afterhours search of a park turns up a young couple in a port-a-potty. An extremely combative man refuses to surrender to officers. A heated argument between best friends catches the attention of the cops.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A young man tries to tell the police what to do; a lawbreaker eludes authorities and causes serious damage; a mother confronts her handcuffed son and emotions run high.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A man with multiple warrants puts up a fight when faced with a trip to jail. A desperate driver makes a last-minute attempt to hide his crime. A teenager is forced to join the workforce after he makes a costly error.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A lawbreaker's polite and respectful demeanor surprises deputies. Suspicious activity at a gas station leads one officer to rely on her instincts. An argument over dinner results in a call to the cops.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: Deputies are shocked when they recognize a repeat offender; a desperate man shows no love for his girlfriend when confronted by police; officers bring in a canine unit to complete a vehicle search.

programme.title: Cops
programme.desc: A homeless man puts up a serious fight to maintain his freedom. A suspicious man and woman in a parked car catch an officer's attention. A lovers' squabble draws attention to an outstanding warrant.

programme.title: La noche más fría
programme.desc: The story focuses on Carlos, a former fighter from the Malvinas (Faulkland islands). Carlos lives in a large city square, under a gazebo that he found in the neighborhood. He tragically lost his family in the War. Times were not kind to Carlos. While looking to reunite with his son, he sweeps sidewalks in exchange for tips to help him survive winter nights which have a punishing effect on Carlo's health. Preparing for the coldest night of the year, driven by the impulse to make it, Carlos packs few belongings to seek refuge in a municipal locality. However, the luck again avoids him. An incident at the door of the shelter leaves Carlos unfairly outside. Completely unprotected, away from his usual spot, without shelter and weak health. The coldest night of the year is looming, and Carlos must face endless adversities in an uneven fight against two cruel enemies: loneliness and cold. Thus begins the coldest night only fueled by the desire to survive.
